subject: Palossand — a sand castle Pokemon shaped as a large tiered sand mound with window-like openings, flanked by smaller sand-creature forms
description: A large tiered sand castle structure dominates the composition — this is Palossand, a sand-mound Pokemon that evolves from the possession of a sandcastle. The central body is a rounded, multi-level sandy form with dark oval openings resembling windows or eyes. Two smaller rounded sandy figures flank the main body on either side, suggesting attendant sand creatures. The ground is a swirling, disturbed sandy surface. The background is dark and turbulent, with a deep amber-brown haze conveying an unsettling, cursed desert atmosphere. The overall palette is warm sand tones — tans, yellows, and muted browns — against a murky dark sky. The mood is eerie and imposing.
foreground: sandy ground with swirling disturbed sand
background: dark turbulent haze, murky amber-brown sky
emotion: looming and unsettling; the structure emanates a possessive, cursed presence
